summary: M6-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 task state is CLOSED after PR #157 passed CI and entered origin/main at 5e68a74374a37fa2f3698ee846462c0525d7341a. This handoff records the closure checkpoint. docs/GATE-M6.md records M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS. Current milestone advances to M7 preparation, but no M7 implementation or content lock begins until the M7 task graph is created or recovered and reviewed.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed.
M6-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 listed as CLOSED; all prior M6 tasks listed as CLOSED.
No READY output after M6 closure because M7 task graph has not yet been created or recovered.
No whitespace errors after closure update.

decisions: Close M6-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 only after the accepted gate entered origin/main.
Advance current_milestone to M7 preparation state.
Do not create M7 content-lock implementation inside the M6 closure task.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE for M7 and M8 unless a later Human Gate reverses it.
risks: M6 remains PASS_WITH_LIMITS with Alpha/local evidence limits and historical M4/M5 PASS_WITH_LIMITS context.
M7 includes culture review and manual playthrough acceptance dimensions; those must be task-graph/Gate-controlled and are not silently approved by this closure.
requested_action: Merge the closure checkpoint, sync main, then create or recover M7-TASK-GRAPH-001 and route it to systems_architect/qa_reviewer before M7 implementation starts.
